title: nephrodium confluens
intro: Nephrodium confluens, also known as the confluence polypody, is a species of fern native to Asia, characterized by its distinctive leaf morphology and distribution of sori. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium confluens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, and is also used in topical applications for its therapeutic properties.
